geotech_term_ja: 人工地盤（盛土・埋立地）
geotech_synonyms_ja: 盛土;埋立地;人工改変地
rationale_en: Human-placed material is treated as artificial ground regardless of parent lithology.
Structural zones are flagged as fault/fracture ground; reclassify polygons only near mapped structures.

geotech_term_ja: 軟弱地盤（有機質土・腐植土）
geotech_synonyms_ja: 腐植土;泥炭;有機質粘土
rationale_en: Organic/peaty Holocene soil = very soft compressible ground.

geotech_term_ja: 火山灰質粘性土（関東ローム）
geotech_synonyms_ja: ローム;火山灰質土;黒ボク
rationale_en: Aeolian volcanic ash soil mapped to the Kanto Loam ground type.
Fine-grained young soil treated as potentially soft/compressible.
Interbedded Holocene soils mapped to alluvial lowland ground type.

geotech_synonyms_ja: 洪積層;段丘礫層;支持層候補
rationale_en: Overconsolidated Pleistocene terrace; commonly a candidate bearing stratum.
Granular soil without age context treated conservatively as alluvial granular ground.

geotech_synonyms_ja: 軟岩;泥岩;砂岩;砂泥互層
rationale_en: Weakly lithified sedimentary rock (UCS typically < ~25 MPa) -> weak rock ground type.

geotech_term_ja: 中硬岩（堆積岩・付加体）
geotech_synonyms_ja: 中硬岩;砂岩頁岩互層;付加体
rationale_en: Harder bedded accretionary rock; still bedding/structure-controlled (note higher strength).
Tuff/pyroclastic rock mapped to pyroclastic ground type; induration variable.
Crystalline/igneous rock mapped to hard rock ground type; weathered mantle near surface.
